use_cases: Primary action trigger for forms and CTAs in commerce interfaces
Navigation links styled as interactive buttons
Destructive action confirmation with variant styling
Secondary action alternatives in multi-step flows
ai_summary: A flexible, reusable button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and class-variance-authority for consistent variant handling. Includes standard hover, focus, and disabled states for accessible interactions.
